{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = 34 |coordinates = 40 |coordinates = 2.20 |coordinates = 133 |coordinates = 58 |coordinates = 4.96 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}} located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River (Okayama)|ja|旭川 (岡山県)}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{DEFAULTSORT:Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} revision.comment: Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市|12=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = 34 |coordinates = 40 |coordinates = 2.20 |coordinates = 133 |coordinates = 58 |coordinates = 4.96 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|12=draft}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=draft}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=draft}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River (Okayama)|ja|旭川 (岡山県)|12=draft}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|12=draft}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=draft}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=draft}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|12=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New2]] }} [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sawada Otsuka Kofun}}

Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市|12=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = 34 |coordinates = 40 |coordinates = 2.20 |coordinates = 133 |coordinates = 58 |coordinates = 4.96 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|12=draft}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=draft}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=draft}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River (Okayama)|ja|旭川 (岡山県)|12=draft}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|12=draft}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=draft}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=draft}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|12=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市|12=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = 34 |coordinates = 40 |coordinates = 2.20 |coordinates = 133 |coordinates = 58 |coordinates = 4.96 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|12=draft}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=draft}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=draft}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River (Okayama)|ja|旭川 (岡山県)|12=draft}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|12=draft}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=draft}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=draft}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|12=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{Kofun navbar}}[[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sawada Otsuka Kofun}}

But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市|12=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = 34 |coordinates = 40 |coordinates = 2.20 |coordinates = 133 |coordinates = 58 |coordinates = 4.96 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|12=draft}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=draft}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=draft}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River (Okayama)|ja|旭川 (岡山県)|12=draft}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|12=draft}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=draft}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=draft}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|12=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|12=draft|12=draft}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=draft|12=draft}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=draft|12=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|12=draft|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|12=draft|12=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{draft categories| }} {{citation needed|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = 34 |coordinates = 40 |coordinates = 2.20 |coordinates = 133 |coordinates = 58 |coordinates = 4.96 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|12=draft|12=draft}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=draft|12=draft}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River (Okayama)|ja|旭川 (岡山県)|12=draft|12=draft}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|12=draft|12=draft}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=draft|12=draft}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=draft|12=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|12=draft|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|12=draft|12=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{draft categories| }} {{citation needed|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]]

The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|12=draft|12=draft}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=draft|12=draft}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=draft|12=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|12=draft|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|12=draft|12=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{draft categories| }} {{citation needed|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]]

{{afc comment|1=See [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = 34 |coordinates = 40 |coordinates = 2.20 |coordinates = 133 |coordinates = 58 |coordinates = 4.96 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River (Okayama)|ja|旭川 (岡山県)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{draft categories| }} {{citation needed|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]]

The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|1=Kōmorizuka Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{draft categories| }} {{citation needed|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]]

revision.comment: 4 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:沢田大塚古墳 up to rev 101786618
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 沢田大塚古墳 |画像 = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
石室開口部 |別名 = |所属 = [[操山古墳群]] |所在地 =[[岡山県]][[岡山市]][[中区 (岡山市)|中区]]沢田 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 40|緯度秒 = 2.20 |経度度 = 133|経度分 = 58|経度秒 = 4.96 |ISO = JP-33 |形状 = [[円墳]] |規模 = 直径16m |埋葬施設 = 片袖式[[横穴式石室]] |出土品 = 不明 |陪塚 = |築造時期 = |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Okayama |アイコン = 円墳 |ラベル = 沢田大塚
古墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''沢田大塚古墳'''（さわだおおつかこふん）は、[[岡山県]][[岡山市]][[中区 (岡山市)|中区]]沢田にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[円墳]]。[[操山古墳群]]を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == 概要 == 岡山県南部、岡山市街地中心部から東方の独立山塊である[[操山]]山塊の北側尾根上に築造された古墳である[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html 沢田大塚古墳]（岡山市シティミュージアム「[https://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/bunkazai_top/index.html 岡山市の文化財探訪]」）。。古くから石室の開口が知られ、現在は内部に石仏が祀られる{{Sfn|沢田大塚古墳（平凡社）|1988}}。 墳形は円形で、直径16メートル（または25メートル{{Sfn|沢田大塚古墳（平凡社）|1988}}）を測る。埋葬施設は片袖式の[[横穴式石室]]で、操山では最大規模であり{{Sfn|沢田大塚古墳（平凡社）|1988}}、西方に開口する。石室内の出土遺物は明らかでない{{Sfn|沢田大塚古墳（平凡社）|1988}}。[[旭川 (岡山県)|旭川]]東岸では古代豪族の[[上道氏]]の存在が知られており、本古墳は上道氏との関連性、および上道氏[[氏寺]]の1つの[[幡多廃寺塔跡|幡多廃寺]]（岡山市中区赤田）への後続性が推測される古墳になる（同様の上道氏関連の後続性として[[唐人塚古墳]]・[[賞田廃寺]]の例がある）。 == 埋葬施設 == 埋葬施設としては、片袖式の[[横穴式石室]]が構築されている。石室規模は次の通り。 * 石室全長：11.4メートル * 玄室：長さ4.8メートル、幅2.4メートル * 羨道：長さ6.4メートル、幅1.7メートル 奥壁は巨石の3段積みによる。吉備の三大巨石墳として知られる[[こうもり塚古墳]]（[[総社市]]）・[[箭田大塚古墳]]（[[倉敷市]]）・[[牟佐大塚古墳]]（岡山市[[北区 (岡山市)|北区]]）では奥壁が1段ないし2段積みであることから、本古墳はそれらに先行すると位置づけられ、当時としては有数の大型石室と評価される。 File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|玄室（奥壁側） File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|玄室（羨道側） File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|羨道（奥に玄室） == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|沢田大塚古墳（平凡社）|1988}}}} == 関連項目 == * [[操山古墳群]] == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html 沢田大塚古墳] - 岡山市シティミュージアム「[https://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/bunkazai_top/index.html 岡山市の文化財探訪]」 {{DEFAULTSORT:さわたおおつかこふん}} [[Category:岡山県の古墳]] [[Category:岡山市中区の歴史]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:上道氏|墓さわたおおつかこふん]]

{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = 34 |coordinates = 40 |coordinates = 2.20 |coordinates = 133 |coordinates = 58 |coordinates = 4.96 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River (Okayama)|ja|旭川 (岡山県)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|1=Kōmorizuka Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{citation needed|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]]

Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = 34 |coordinates = 40 |coordinates = 2.20 |coordinates = 133 |coordinates = 58 |coordinates = 4.96 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River (Okayama)|ja|旭川 (岡山県)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|1=Kōmorizuka Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{citation needed|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]]

Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|1=Kōmorizuka Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]]

So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = 34 |coordinates = 40 |coordinates = 2.20 |coordinates = 133 |coordinates = 58 |coordinates = 4.96 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Okayama|ja|中区 (岡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River (Okayama)|ja|旭川 (岡山県)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|1=Kōmorizuka Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]]

The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|ja|幡多廃寺塔跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hata temple ruins|qq=}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|qq=}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|qq=}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|qq=}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|ja|こうもり塚古墳|1=Kōmorizuka Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōmorizuka Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōmorizuka Kofun|qq=}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = 34 |coordinates = 40 |coordinates = 2.20 |coordinates = 133 |coordinates = 58 |coordinates = 4.96 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Passage grave|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}} located in [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitō Clan|qq=}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the [[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River (Okayama)]]. The kofun's connection to [[:en:Hata temple ruins|Hata temple ruins]] (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|qq=}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|qq=}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|qq=}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:上道氏]]

The kofun's connection to [[:en:Hata temple ruins|Hata temple ruins]] (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|qq=}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|qq=}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|qq=}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:上道氏]] [[Category:岡山市中区の歴史]] [[Category:岡山県の古墳]]
