So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = 34 |coordinates = 40 |coordinates = 2.20 |coordinates = 133 |coordinates = 58 |coordinates = 4.96 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Passage grave|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=}} located in [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitō Clan|qq=}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the [[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River (Okayama)]]. The kofun's connection to [[:en:Hata temple ruins|Hata temple ruins]] (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|qq=}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|qq=}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|qq=}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:上道氏]] [[Category:岡山市中区の歴史]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]]

The kofun's connection to [[:en:Hata temple ruins|Hata temple ruins]] (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Kamitō Clan|Tomb Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]] [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:上道氏]] [[Category:岡山市中区の歴史]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] {{Commons category|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}}

[[commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q55522669]] Wikidata name: Sawada Otsuka Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:08, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = {{Coord|34.667278|N|133.968044|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Passage grave|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site |architectural_styles = {{ill|circular kofun|qid=Q11394747}} }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitō Clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the [[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River (Okayama)]]. The kofun's connection to [[:en:Hata temple ruins|Hata temple ruins]] (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Jodo clan]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama City]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] {{Commons category|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q55522669}}

Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. Entrance to the burial chamber |location = [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = {{Coord|34.667278|N|133.968044|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Passage grave|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site |architectural_styles = {{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747}} }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitō Clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the [[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River (Okayama)]]. The kofun's connection to [[:en:Hata temple ruins|Hata temple ruins]] (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Jodo clan]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama City]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] {{Commons category|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q55522669}}

[[sn:commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q55522669]] Wikidata name: Sawada Otsuka Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:08, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = {{Coord|34.667278|N|133.968044|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Passage grave|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site |architectural_styles = {{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747}} }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitō Clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the [[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River (Okayama)]]. The kofun's connection to [[:en:Hata temple ruins|Hata temple ruins]] (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Jodo clan]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama City]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] {{Commons category|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q55522669}}

Entrance to the burial chamber |location = [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = {{Coord|34.667278|N|133.968044|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Passage grave|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site |architectural_styles = {{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747}} }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitō Clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the [[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River (Okayama)]]. The kofun's connection to [[:en:Hata temple ruins|Hata temple ruins]] (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Jodo clan]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama City]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] {{Commons category|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q55522669}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

[[sn:commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q55522669]] Wikidata name: Sawada Otsuka Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:08, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = {{Coord|34.667278|N|133.968044|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Passage grave|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site |architectural_styles = {{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747}} }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitō Clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the [[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River (Okayama)]]. The kofun's connection to [[:en:Hata temple ruins|Hata temple ruins]] (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Jodo clan]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama City]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] {{Commons category|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q55522669}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. [[commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[sn:commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q55522669]] Wikidata name: Sawada Otsuka Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:08, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = {{Coord|34.667278|N|133.968044|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Passage grave|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site |architectural_styles = {{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747}} }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitō Clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the [[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River (Okayama)]]. The kofun's connection to [[:en:Hata temple ruins|Hata temple ruins]] (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] }} [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:Jodo clan]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama City]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] {{Commons category|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q55522669}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

[[commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[sn:commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q55522669]] Wikidata name: Sawada Otsuka Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:08, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = {{Coord|34.667278|N|133.968044|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Passage grave|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site |architectural_styles = {{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747}} }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka Ward, Okayama]], Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitō Clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the [[:en:Asahi River|Asahi River (Okayama)]]. The kofun's connection to [[:en:Hata temple ruins|Hata temple ruins]] (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including [[:en:Kōmorizuka Kofun|Kōmorizuka Kofun]], [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]], and [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]]—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] {{Commons category|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q55522669}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama City]] [[Category:Jodo clan]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[co:commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[co:commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[sn:commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q55522669]] Wikidata name: Sawada Otsuka Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:08, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka-ku, Okayama|en|Naka-ku, Okayama|WD=Q852116|lt=Naka Ward, Okayama}}, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|WD=Q200078|lt=Okayama City}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = {{Coord|34.667278|N|133.968044|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Passage grave|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site |architectural_styles = {{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747}} }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in {{ill|Naka-ku, Okayama|en|Naka-ku, Okayama|WD=Q852116|lt=Naka Ward, Okayama}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitō Clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River|en|Asahi River|WD=Q2866291|lt=Asahi River (Okayama)}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|en|Hata temple ruins|WD=Q11481858|lt=Hata temple ruins}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|en|Kōmorizuka Kofun|WD=Q11266204|lt=Kōmorizuka Kofun}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|WD=Q11603302|lt=Yata Ōtsuka Kofun}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|WD=Q11570258|lt=Musa Ōtsuka Kofun}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] {{Commons category|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q55522669}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama City]] [[Category:Jodo clan]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

revision.text:
[[co:commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[co:commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[sn:commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka-ku, Okayama|en|Naka-ku, Okayama|WD=Q852116|lt=Naka Ward, Okayama}}, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|WD=Q200078|lt=Okayama City}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = {{Coord|34.667278|N|133.968044|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Passage grave|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site |architectural_styles = {{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747}} }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in {{ill|Naka-ku, Okayama|en|Naka-ku, Okayama|WD=Q852116|lt=Naka Ward, Okayama}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitō Clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River|en|Asahi River|WD=Q2866291|lt=Asahi River (Okayama)}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|en|Hata temple ruins|WD=Q11481858|lt=Hata temple ruins}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|en|Kōmorizuka Kofun|WD=Q11266204|lt=Kōmorizuka Kofun}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|WD=Q11603302|lt=Yata Ōtsuka Kofun}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|WD=Q11570258|lt=Musa Ōtsuka Kofun}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time. File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] {{Commons category|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q55522669}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama City]] [[Category:Jodo clan]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-1.jpg|Main chamber (rear wall side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, genshitsu-2.jpg|Main chamber (passage side) File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, sendou.jpg|Passage (leading to the chamber) == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=沢田大塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[Heibonsha|ja|平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|SawadaOtsuka1988}}}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] - Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site." {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|沢田大塚古墳|version=101786618|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] {{Commons category|Sawada Otsuka Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q55522669}} [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:History of Naka Ward, Okayama City]] [[Category:Jodo clan]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

[[co:commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[co:commons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTcommons:Category:Sawada Otsuka Kofun]][[ja:沢田大塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name = Sawada Otsuka Kofun |image = [[File:Sawada Otsuka Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Entrance to the burial chamber |location = {{ill|Naka-ku, Okayama|en|Naka-ku, Okayama|WD=Q852116|lt=Naka Ward, Okayama|1=Naka-ku, Okayama}}, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|WD=Q200078|lt=Okayama City|1=Okayama}}, Okayama Prefecture |coordinates = {{Coord|34.667278|N|133.968044|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size = Diameter: 16m |burial = Single-entrance {{ill|Passage grave|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Passage grave|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Unknown |status = Not Historic Site1 as a historic site |architectural_styles = {{ill|circular kofun|WD=Q11394747|1=Round Kofun}} }} '''Sawada Otsuka Kofun''' (沢田大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in {{ill|Naka-ku, Okayama|en|Naka-ku, Okayama|WD=Q852116|lt=Naka Ward, Okayama|1=Naka-ku, Okayama}}, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Misaoyama Kofun Group|ja|操山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misaoyama Kofun Group|qq=}} and is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == Located on the northern ridge of the Misaoyama massif, an independent hill range east of Okayama City's center, this tumulus has been known for its exposed burial chamber, which now houses a Buddhist statue.[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun3/04.html Sawada Otsuka Kofun] (Okayama City Museum, "Explore Okayama City's Historic Site"). The tumulus is round in type, measuring 16 meters in diameter (or 25 meters according to some sources). The burial chamber features a single-entrance passage grave (片袖式横穴式石室) opening westward. The chamber's burial goods are unknown. The tomb is associated with the powerful {{ill|Kamitō Clan|ja|上道氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitō Clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, whose influence spanned the eastern banks of the {{ill|Asahi River|en|Asahi River|WD=Q2866291|lt=Asahi River (Okayama)|1=Asahi River}}. The kofun's connection to {{ill|Hata temple ruins|en|Hata temple ruins|WD=Q11481858|lt=Hata temple ruins|1=Hata temple ruins}} (a Kamitō氏 clan temple) suggests a continuity of their lineage, similar to the {{ill|Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja|唐人塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōjinzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and its link to {{ill|Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja|賞田廃寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōden Haiji Temple Ruins|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == burial Chamber == The burial chamber is a single-entrance passage grave with the following area: * Total length: 11.4 meters * burial chamber: 4.8 meters long, 2.4 meters wide * Passage: 6.4 meters long, 1.7 meters wide The rear wall of the chamber comprises three large stacked stones. Compared to the famed {{ill|Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja|吉備三大巨石墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Stone Chambers of Kibi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}—including {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|en|Kōmorizuka Kofun|WD=Q11266204|lt=Kōmorizuka Kofun|1=Kōmorizuka Kofun}}, {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|WD=Q11603302|lt=Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|1=Yata Ōtsuka Kofun}}, and {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|WD=Q11570258|lt=Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|1=Musa Ōtsuka Kofun}}—which utilize one or two stacked layers, this burial chamber predates them and represents a highly advanced design for its time.
